name: Ningbo Yongxin Optics Co., Ltd.
summary: Ningbo Yong Xin Optics Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells optical instruments and components in China. It offers optical microscopes and optical components used for various applications in optical and electronic products, such as bar-code scanners, motion optics, automotive driving, high-end cameras, HD projection, teaching, life sciences, semiconductors, etc. The company offers its products under the NOVEL, JIANGNAN, and NEXCOPE brands. It also exports its products to approximately 100 countries. The company was formerly known as Ningbo Yongxin Optical Instrument Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Ningbo Yong Xin Optics Co., Ltd. in 2000. Ningbo Yong Xin Optics Co., Ltd. was founded in 1997 and is based in Ningbo, China.
